name: normuon_wd
why: Community-paired optimizer discipline package: NorMuon (per-row second-moment normalization) + MuonWD=0.04 (decoupled weight decay). Every submission beating us uses at least one. Bundled because the community always pairs them and the causal story is unified: tighter optimizer discipline -> smaller weights -> better quant.
validates: Better val_bpb or better quant gap at matched wallclock.
falsifies: NorMuon+WD together are not worth the complexity; the baseline Muon is already good enough.
notes: WD=0.04 is the community sweet spot (#180). NorMuon from #89, #173.
This is a package test, not a mechanism-level test. If it wins, follow-on should isolate NorMuon vs WD.
